headline: Ambulatory Surgery Centers: A Long-Term Growth Opportunity for ISRG?
summary: ISRG targets fast-growing ambulatory surgery centers with lower-cost da Vinci systems, positioning for long-term procedure growth as care shifts beyond hospitals.
